stemHtml: A battery has a capacity of 100 Ah. What does it mean?

options.a: It will likely be able to provide 10 Amperes in 10 hours.
options.b: It will not be able to provide more than 100 Amperes in less than 60 minutes.
options.c: It will likely be able to provide 10 Amperes in 15 minutes.
options.d: It will likely be able to provide 5 Amperes in 30 minutes.
